subcodes.first_line: O Pure God! We are Thy servants and bondswomen, helpless, wretched and wandering, steeped in sin, heedless and full of error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک یزدانا قوللرز و کوله لرز افتاده یز بیچاره یز آواره یز پرگناهز بی انتباهز پراشتباهز
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for forgiveness
